checks.finding: Every task-referenced AC-ID exists in acceptance-tests.md.
All six tasks contain a canonical Blockers section; each is either None or a valid task-ID list.
REQ-001 through REQ-012 are assigned to implementation tasks.
AC-001 through AC-014 are assigned to tasks.
Every task maps to at least one requirement and acceptance criterion.
Every acceptance criterion maps to a task and requirement.
All tasks are Approval: Draft and Status: Planned while Task-Review-Status is Pending.
Every task declares Risk, Risk Rationale, and an explicit Required Workflow appropriate to its risk and work type.
Each acceptance criterion has one owning task in the task mapping.
Dependencies cover registry and precheck repair before validator work, validator work before integrations, and both integrations before release metadata.
The supplied dependency graph is acyclic.
Each task has one cohesive implementation concern with aligned scope and exclusions.
Every task defines inspectable outcomes, concrete commands or fixtures, evidence artifacts, independent review where required, and rollback verification.
Task requirements and acceptance criteria exactly agree with traceability.md task mappings, and all task statuses are Planned.
